name: Phil Hills
description: Creator of the Q Protocol and A2AC Standard. Specialist in deterministic AI agent orchestration, Salesforce Agentforce, and autonomous swarm coordination. Architect of the Cube SDK — a 19-module Python framework for agent identity, trust, memory, and communication.

hasCredential.name: Q Protocol — Deterministic AI Coordination
